    <item>
      <title>Paul George plays hero for 76ers in second game after suspension </title>
      <description>In only his second game since serving a 25-game suspension for violating the NBA's anti-drug policy, Paul George played the role of hero for the Philadelphia 76ers in their win over the Charlotte Hornets on Saturday night.</description>
      <pubDate>29 Mar 2026 00:07:30 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/paul_george_plays_hero_for_76ers_in_second_game_after_suspension/s1_13132_43659449</link>

    <item>
      <title>Nuclear option should get serious consideration from NBA to combat tanking</title>
      <description>Try as the NBA might, but tanking isn't going away. While pondering how to de-incentivize losing, commissioner Adam Silver must consider the nuclear option.</description>
      <pubDate>29 Mar 2026 00:35:29 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/nuclear_option_should_get_serious_consideration_from_nba_to_combat_tanking/s1_13132_43657935</link>

    <item>
      <title>Kawhi Leonard's clutch shot saves Clippers from embarrassing loss</title>
      <description>Kawhi Leonard declared his Los Angeles Clippers are "not scared of nobody" going into the playoffs. Friday, his clutch shot saved the Clippers when the 16-win Indiana Pacers put a scare into them.</description>

    <item>
      <title>NBA seeking more punitive anti-tanking penalties, including fining teams 'millions of dollars'</title>
      <description>In addition to planning to reform the draft lottery in an effort to deter teams from tanking, the NBA is also interested in expanding its ability to penalize teams who manipulate player availability and rotations in an effort to lose.</description>
      <pubDate>27 Mar 2026 22:47:38 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/nba_seeking_more_punitive_anti_tanking_penalties_including_fining_teams_millions_of_dollars/s1_14822_43653950</link>

      <media:content url="http://www.yardbarker.com/media/8/4/84b67a0f7404fa4e2d3ecae2260f346214389053/thumb_16x9/feb-15-2026-inglewood-california-usa-nba.jpg">
        <media:credit> Kirby Lee-Imagn Images </media:credit>

    </item>

      <title>Joel Embiid takes a shot at Oneil Cruz over his Opening Day blunders</title>
